summary: MANUTRIX Iteration 10 - Professional Authentication Testing Complete. Backend: 17/17 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All auth features verified working including forgot password flow, reset password with token, admin user management (list/edit/reset/delete), force password change on temp password login, and bcrypt password hashing.

minor.issue: Email was not normalized to lowercase on user creation (FIXED during testing)

passed_tests: Backend: Admin login successful with bcrypt hashed password
Backend: Tecnico login successful
Backend: Invalid credentials correctly rejected (401)
Backend: POST /api/auth/forgot-password returns token for existing user
Backend: POST /api/auth/forgot-password returns success for non-existent email (security)
Backend: POST /api/auth/reset-password with valid token resets password
Backend: POST /api/auth/reset-password rejects invalid token (400)
Backend: POST /api/auth/reset-password rejects short password (400)
Backend: POST /api/auth/change-password changes own password
Backend: GET /api/admin/users lists all users
Backend: POST /api/admin/users/{id}/reset-password generates temp password with force_password_change=true
Backend: PUT /api/admin/users/{id} updates user name/email/role
Backend: POST /api/admin/users creates new user with bcrypt hash
Backend: bcrypt hash format verified (login works)
Backend: SHA-256 to bcrypt migration working
Backend: GET /api/auth/me returns current user without password_hash
Backend: Dashboard stats accessible after login
Frontend: Login page shows 'Esqueci minha senha' link
Frontend: Click 'Esqueci minha senha' shows forgot password form
Frontend: Forgot password flow: enter email -> solicitar -> shows reset form with token pre-filled
Frontend: Reset password form has token field and new password fields
Frontend: Admin user management page loads with user list
Frontend: User list shows edit/lock/delete buttons on hover
Frontend: Admin reset password shows temp password modal with data-testid='temp-password'
Frontend: Admin edit user modal pre-fills user data
Frontend: Force password change form displayed after login with temp password
Frontend: After force change, user can login with new password
Frontend: Sidebar navigation regression - all pages load correctly

new_features_verified.description: Login page has 'Esqueci minha senha' link -> forgot form with email -> API returns token -> reset form with token pre-filled
POST /api/auth/reset-password accepts token + new_password, validates min 6 chars, resets password
GET /api/admin/users lists users, PUT updates user, POST creates user, DELETE soft-deletes user
POST /api/admin/users/{id}/reset-password generates temp password, sets force_password_change=true
After admin reset, user login shows force change form, POST /api/auth/change-password without current_password
hash_password uses bcrypt.gensalt() + bcrypt.hashpw(), verify_password supports both bcrypt ($2b$) and legacy SHA-256
Admin can edit user name, email, role, phone via modal with pre-filled data

critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: Email normalization in admin_create_user endpoint - now converts to lowercase to match login behavior
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing users for testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Professional authentication fully implemented and tested. LoginPage has 4 views (login/forgot/reset/forceChange) with data-testids: login-form, login-email, login-password, login-submit, forgot-password-link, forgot-form, forgot-email, reset-form, reset-token, reset-new-password, force-change-form. AdminUsuariosPage has user list with hover actions (edit/lock/delete), temp password modal with data-testid='temp-password'. Backend endpoints: POST /api/auth/forgot-password (returns token), POST /api/auth/reset-password, POST /api/auth/change-password, POST /api/admin/users/{id}/reset-password, PUT /api/admin/users/{id}. bcrypt hashing with SHA-256 backward compatibility.
